1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUKKER, STEPHEN AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT HAHN, RONALD INDIVIDUALS AND HUSBAND AND WIFE HAAN, CINTHIA INDIVIDUALS AND HUSBAND AND WIFE HAAN REI,INC.,A CORPORATION SYNDACON,INC.,A CORPORATION DOES 4 TO 100

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: THE MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. AS TO ALL OF THE INTERROGATORIES SET FORTH IN THE SEPARATE STATEMENT OF MATTERS IN DISPUTE, THE OBJECTION THAT THE TERM "INCIDENT" IS VAGUE AND AMBIGUOUS IS OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. DEFENDANT MAY ANSWER BY STATING HER DEFINITION OF "INCIDENT" AS A PREFACE TO A RESPONSE. AS TO RESPONSES THAT RESERVE THE RIGHT TO AMEND THE ANSWERS, THEY ARE ORDERED STRICKEN. A RESPONSE MUST BE FULL AND COMPLETE AT THE TIME IT IS MADE. IF THERE IS A NEED TO AMEND, IT MUST BE MADE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 2030(M). THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ADDITIONAL ORDERS AS TO: 12.4, 12.5, 12.6, AND 12.7: THE OBJECTION TO THE INTERROGATORIES BASED ON THE ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE, WHILE NOT OVERRULED, IS NOT IMPLICATED BY THE ABOVE INTERROGATORIES. SIMILARLY, THE INTERROGATORIES DO NOT CONFLICT WITH THE PROVISIONS OF CCP SECTION 2034.15.1: THE OBJECTION TO THE INTERROGATORIES BASED ON THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT AND ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGES, WHILE NOT OVERRULED, ARE NOT IMPLICATED BY THE ABOVE INTERROGATORIES. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER AS TO THE SPECIFIED SUBPARTS. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT HAVE SUFFICIENT KNOWLEDGE TO RESPOND FULLY, THE ANSWER MUST COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 2030 (F)(1).16.1 -16.3, 16.7 - 16.8, 17.1: DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER AS TO THE SPECIFIED SUBPARTS. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT HAVE SUFFICIENT KNOWLEDGE TO RESPOND FULLY, THE ANSWER MUST COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 2030 (F)(1). DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES BY FEBRUARY 25, 2005. IF AN ANSWER IS OTHERWISE COMPLETE AFTER THE OVERRULED OBJECTIONS AND THE RESERVATION OF THE RIGHT TO RESPOND ARE STRICKEN, DEFENDANT SHALL VERIFY THAT REPRESENTATION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ALL REQUESTS FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
